subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy missive, fragrant with musk, was sweet as honey and nectar, delightful to the taste [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق نامه مشکین چون شهد و انگبین شکر و شیرین بود و مذاق حلاوت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
